emails.subject: FW: CES2139 Project Proposal
emails.body: FW: CES2139 Project Proposal Chris, This is the proposal I need approved. CSC indicated that they will spend time over the weekend to turn this around for us by the middle of next week but we obviously need to get back to them quickly. Please advise. Ken

emails.subject: RE: CES2139 Project Proposal
emails.body: RE: CES2139 Project Proposal Put Tim Belden name on it as VP

emails.subject: RE: CES2139 Project Proposal
emails.body: Has Tim approved this verbally? If so, please let me know and I will notify CSC and forward a copy to Tim for his signiture. kl

emails.subject: RE: CES2139 Project Proposal
emails.body: Ken, You just need to put his name in and send it off, we just got thorough doing this Monday. If anyone has any questions feel free to have them call me.

emails.subject: FW: CES2139 Project Proposal
emails.body: Chris, can you provide this... Thanks
